speaker: Judge
text: Court is now in session for the trial of the Richman family's maid Ella...uh, says here she's too poor for a last name...for the crime of kidnapping Betty Richman. The prosecution may now begin their opening statement.

speaker: Jane Prosecutor
text: No need, your honor. The defendant is already clearly guilty, so no need for an opening statement. We may now begin with the defendant's statement.
